title: Raciborskanthos minax
taxonomy: Raciborskanthos minax is a species of fungus in the family Ceratobasidiaceae. It belongs to the genus Raciborskanthos, which is a group of fungi characterized by their unique reproductive structures. Raciborskanthos minax is classified as a basidiomycete, a type of fungus that produces spores on a basidium. This species is likely a saprotroph, obtaining its nutrients by breaking down organic matter in its environment. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and characteristics of Raciborskanthos minax.
